prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约1303→1520→3403→1884→2000，波动较大。2023年因断档异常冲高至3403名，2024年迅速回稳至1884名，2025年基准约2000名。近两年位次在1884–2000区间窄幅波动，整体趋于稳定；2021–2024年理科计划均为109人，2025年物理类增至115人；2026年计划108人，较2025年缩招约6.1%，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第18名，稳居全国Top20，层次极高；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假等），但整体关注度可控；抖音热度排名第26（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可。2022–2023年曾因土木工程专业断档引发广泛讨论，但近年已逐步消化；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A等，A-及以上学科共17个，学科实力极为雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校信息类、智能化制造类等招生大类高度契合，提升报考吸引力；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望，但同济土木为A+学科，仍具品牌效应。2026年山西省物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；同济大学位于上海，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山西省招生占比约4.7%–5.1%（2025年），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在1884–2000区间、2026年缩招约6.1%使竞争加剧、考生人数略减3.4%部分对冲、学校层次极高且优势学科众多等因素，在2025年基准2000名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约1977名，区间1752–2202名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category fluctuated significantly: approximately 1303 → 1520 → 3403 → 1884 → 2000. In 2023, an anomaly caused a spike to 3403, but it quickly stabilized to 1884 in 2024, with a baseline of about 2000 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 1884–2000 range, showing overall stability. The science enrollment plan was 109 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 115 in 2025 for physics category, and is planned at 108 in 2026, a reduction of about 6.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 18th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, indicating a very high level. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (e.g., paper data fabrication), but overall attention is manageable. Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure, and application attention is acceptable. From 2022 to 2023, there was widespread discussion due to a cutoff anomaly in civil engineering, but it has gradually been absorbed. Disciplines include A+ in Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Environmental Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, A in Architecture, Computer Science and Technology, etc., with a total of 17 A- or above disciplines, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, aligning well with the university's information and intelligent manufacturing enrollment categories, enhancing application appeal. Civil and architectural majors show divergent popularity, but Tongji's Civil Engineering is an A+ discipline, still holding brand effect. In 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 4.7%–5.1% (2025), at a moderately high level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 1884–2000 in recent years, the 6.1% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the 3.4% decrease in candidate numbers partially offsetting, and the university's very high level with numerous advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 2000, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1977, with a range of 1752–2202.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1752–2202, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1752), prioritize aiming for top engineering experimental classes like Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class. If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 2202), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission, while also attempting Tier 2 moderate majors.
